flags.description: Excludes development-only NuGet dependencies (analyzers, source generators, build tools marked with PrivateAssets=all) from the BOM.
flags.guidance: If the project has dev-only packages (analyzers like StyleCop, Roslyn analyzers, source generators) and you want a production-only BOM, exclude the 'DEV' type.

flags.description: A comma-separated list of project names (supports regex) within the solution to exclude from the BOM. Projects with matching names will be skipped during inspection.
flags.guidance: If the solution contains test or utility projects that should not appear in the production BOM, exclude them by name.
